description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a minimalist white facade, accented by large windows and natural wood paneling. The structure is single-story, with an open-plan layout visible through the expansive glass doors and windows. Outdoor living spaces include a patio with dining furniture, a private pool area, and lush landscaping with palm trees and shrubs. The main entrance is set back, with a concrete walkway and a small garden area. The rear of the bungalow opens to a secluded backyard, providing privacy and relaxation. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor environments.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, wood accents, and lush landscaping, featuring open living spaces and a private pool.
description_view_0: This view highlights the side facade with two large windows, a patio area with outdoor furniture, and lush palm trees.
description_view_1: The front facade is visible, showing the main entrance, a concrete walkway, grouped windows, and decorative shrubs.
description_view_2: This angle reveals the private pool area, wood privacy screens, and a side entrance, with minimal window openings.
description_view_3: The rear of the bungalow is shown, featuring a secluded backyard with dense palm trees and limited window exposure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and isolated windows
